title: A reproducible benchmark with sequence-similarity auditing for coding and non-coding genomic fragment classification across flatfish genomes
description: Source code for benchmark generation, FlatfishBert pretraining and fine-tuning, DNABERT-2 baseline evaluation, cross-species transfer evaluation, diagnostic task experiments, figure generation, and MMseqs2 train-test sequence-similarity auditing. Processed datasets, FlatfishBert checkpoints, result artifacts, and compact supplementary-table TSVs are archived separately in the Zenodo data/model record.
